meaning: n.闉嬪甫,闆堕挶,闆舵槦璧勯噾
examples: The club exists on a shoestring budget.
The theatre will be run on a shoestring.
The movie was made on a shoestring budget.
Technology has allowed companies to launch on a shoestring budget and grow more efficiently.
Like many disabled athletes, Mr. Novak operates on a shoestring budget, without major endorsements.
